data.title: Add RELATES_TO_DRIFT handler to sprint SKILL.md Drift Detection section
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description

The sprint SKILL.md Drift Detection Check section currently handles only DRIFT_DETECTED and NO_DRIFT from sprint-drift-check.sh. It needs to also handle RELATES_TO_DRIFT output lines and convert them to REPLAN_TRIGGER: drift ticket comments.

### Implementation Steps

1. In plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md, find the Drift Detection Check section (after "Run the drift check")
2. After the existing DRIFT_DETECTED handling, add a RELATES_TO_DRIFT handler:
   - Parse RELATES_TO_DRIFT lines from DRIFT_RESULT (format: RELATES_TO_DRIFT: <epic-id> <summary>)
   - For each RELATES_TO_DRIFT line, record REPLAN_TRIGGER: drift comment on the epic
   - Log the relates_to drift detection
3. The handler should follow the same pattern as DRIFT_DETECTED handling

### File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md (modify — add RELATES_TO_DRIFT handler in Drift Detection section)

### Constraints
- This is a safeguard file edit — authorized by epic SC1 requiring REPLAN_TRIGGER emission
- Must use REPLAN_TRIGGER: drift type (existing contract type)
- Must preserve existing DRIFT_DETECTED handling

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Sprint SKILL.md contains RELATES_TO_DRIFT handler
  Verify: grep -q "RELATES_TO_DRIFT" plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] Handler emits REPLAN_TRIGGER: drift
  Verify: grep -A5 "RELATES_TO_DRIFT" plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md | grep -q "REPLAN_TRIGGER"
